header.title: Same product, different limits.
header.description: The free tier gives base access to the platform and AI. Tests and full syllabus content are reserved for Premium.

metrics.billingDescription: The system is already prepared for annual billing and temporary discounts.

public.title: Choose the plan that matches your pace
public.description: Both plans keep the same core product. The real difference is usage capacity and study depth.
public.freeBestFor: People getting started and validating the methodology without commitment.
public.proBestFor: People studying every day who need full continuity in AI and revision.

ai.free: AI with initial capacity for occasional doubts.
ai.pro: AI with expanded capacity for intensive usage.

ai.label: AI usage
ai.free: Base access for occasional questions and light daily support.
ai.pro: Higher daily capacity for intensive sessions and continuous work.

quickTests.label: Quick tests
quickTests.pro: Available for block reviews and longer sessions.

pace.label: Preparation pace
pace.free: Gradual pace to explore the platform.
pace.pro: Daily pace with continuity and less friction.

currentPlan.descriptionFree: Right now you have {{aiLimit}} AI requests per day. Quick tests are available only in Premium.
currentPlan.descriptionPro: Right now you have {{aiLimit}} AI requests per day and quick tests up to {{quickTestLimit}} questions.
currentPlan.cancelScheduled: Cancellation scheduled: you keep Premium until {{date}}.

future.title: Annual plans and timed discounts
future.description: The data layer already supports monthly or yearly plans, percentage discounts, and duration in months or per annual cycle. Only monthly is exposed for now.

discounts.title: Apply code
discounts.description: If you have a valid code, you can attach it to your active subscription. The system supports percentage discounts with limited duration by months or yearly term.
discounts.loginCta: Sign in to apply a code

items.sameFeatures: Both plans share the same core product capabilities.
items.aiQuota: The real difference is the daily AI quota: 3 versus 20.
items.quickTestQuota: Quick tests are available only in Premium.
items.discounts: Discounts are applied as percentage reductions with explicit duration.

selector.title: Choose your plan before entering.
selector.description: Your account is already created. Before accessing the dashboard, pick the plan you want to start with. You can change it later from your account.
selector.summaryTitle: What you are about to activate
selector.summaryDescription: Review the selected plan, monthly amount, and access that will be enabled when you continue.
selector.summaryCheckoutNote: Payment is completed on the secure checkout before Premium is activated.
selector.summaryFreeNote: With the free plan you will enter directly with no payment.
selector.helper: We need an explicit choice to activate your plan and available access level.
selector.footer: The selection is applied immediately. If you choose Premium, the subscription layer is already ready for real billing later.
selector.discountHintPro: You can leave the code prepared here, but the actual discount is applied only after Premium is active.
selector.discountHintFree: Discounts only apply to the Premium plan.
selector.discountRequiresProDescription: Select Premium if you want to prepare a discount for that plan.
selector.discountPendingDescription: It cannot be attached yet. The discount is applied once the Pro subscription is active.

highlights.sameFeatures: Both plans keep the same core platform features.
highlights.freeLimit: Free starts with 3 AI requests per day and no quick tests.
highlights.proLimit: Premium unlocks quick tests and expands AI usage to 20 daily requests.

toasts.savedDescription: Your account is now ready with the {{plan}} plan.

upgradeDialog.footer: Switching to Premium expands this feature limit without changing the rest of your setup.

assistant.title: You used all free-plan AI requests
assistant.description: The free tier stops at {{currentLimit}} requests per day. Premium expands that to {{targetLimit}} so you can keep using AI today.

quick-test.title: Quick tests are available only in Premium
quick-test.description: Your current plan does not include access to tests. Switch to Premium to unlock them.
quick-test.currentValue: Current access: this plan does not include tests.
quick-test.targetValue: With Premium you can generate and take tests.

billingIssue.title: We could not collect your Premium subscription payment
billingIssue.description: We detected a failure on the latest charge attempt. Update your payment method to avoid downgrading to the Basic plan when the retry window ends.
billingIssue.bannerTitle: There is an issue with your payment method
billingIssue.emptyDescription: There is currently no pending payment error on your subscription.

toasts.portalRedirectDescription: Taking you to the secure portal to manage your subscription.
toasts.portalRedirectErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.

toasts.planChangedDescription: Your account now uses the {{plan}} plan.
toasts.planChangedErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.
toasts.paymentRedirectDescription: Taking you to checkout to complete Premium subscription.
toasts.checkoutStartErrorDescription: Try again in a few seconds.
toasts.checkoutSuccessDescription: Your plan will refresh in a few seconds.
toasts.discountAppliedDescription: The discount is now attached to your active subscription.
toasts.discountAppliedErrorDescription: Review the code and try again.

free.name: Free
free.description: Best for getting started, validating the product, and keeping a light routine with no monthly cost.
features: Ideal for exploring the platform before scaling up.

pro.name: Premium
pro.description: Built for users relying on the product every day and needing continuity with AI, tests, and full syllabus access for 5.99 EUR per month.
features: All free-plan capabilities with no extra cuts.
Compatible with percentage discounts for months or yearly term.
